headline: EdTech Sector Reaches RM2.8 Billion But Quality Questioned
context: Malaysia education technology generated RM2.8 billion but consumer survey found only 38% satisfied with outcomes.

cards.big: EdTech hits RM2.8 billion but only 38% users report satisfaction
cards.sub: Rapid platform growth outpaces quality assurance mechanisms

cards.big: 280 platforms operate but only 45 have MQA accreditation
cards.sub: Unaccredited platforms account for RM1.2 billion from unverified courses

cards.big: Parents spent average RM3,600 on supplementary online education per child
cards.sub: Spending grew 45% but performance metrics showed no improvement

cards.big: 12 startups received RM180 million in government grants since 2023
cards.sub: Grant conditions lack measurable learning outcome requirements

cards.big: EdTech quality tests whether investment in education technology translates to actual learning
RM2.8 billion EdTech with quality questioned. Education technology works when pedagogy drives design, not profit.
